description_long: This object is a professional audio mixing console, featuring a rectangular black chassis with multiple rows of white and gray faders, knobs, and buttons. The top surface is densely populated with tactile controls, including sliders, rotary dials, and illuminated buttons, likely for channel selection and audio adjustment. A small digital display with green and yellow indicators is present, suggesting real-time feedback or level monitoring. The side panels are solid and slightly angled, giving the device a robust and ergonomic profile. The rear and side views reveal a consistent, solid build with no visible ports or connectors, indicating they may be located on the back or underside. The overall design is utilitarian and built for durability, suitable for use in studios, live events, or urban public installations.
description: A professional audio mixing console with multiple faders, knobs, and a digital display, housed in a sturdy black chassis. The surface is densely packed with tactile controls and illuminated indicators.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of faders, knobs, and the central digital display with illuminated indicators.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the console and the raised control surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the uniform height of the device.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, mirroring the other side and showing the sloped profile.
attribute_key_layout: Audio mixing console layout with multiple channel strips and control section
